blockingIssues.description: SESSION_SECRET falls back to a hardcoded default in app/apps/server/src/app.ts:24, violating the requirement to read session secret from environment only (VAL-SEC-003).

Login code path for non-existent user avoids Bun.password.verify in app/apps/server/src/routes/auth.ts:50, producing timing differences versus wrong-password path and violating timing consistency expectation (VAL-SEC-002).
